chronology.time: <STRING: 24-hour current game clock time formatted as 'HH:MM'>
chronology.environment: <STRING: Current micro-setting or dungeon tier name, lowercase with underscores>

active_effects.source: <STRING: Character, NPC, or trap name originating the effect>
active_effects.effect: <STRING: Spell, item, or environmental condition name, e.g., 'Torch', 'Bless', 'Web'>
active_effects.rem_duration: <STRING: Time left before expiry, e.g., '50m' for fifty minutes, '8r' for eight rounds>

local_factions.<STRING: faction_or_guild_identifier>: <INTEGER: Numerical affinity ranking restricted from -5 (mortal enemy) to +5 (revered ally)>

npc_dispositions.<STRING: npc_name_identifier>: <STRING: Immediate stance toward the party, e.g., 'hostile' | 'wary' | 'neutral' | 'friendly' | 'loyal'>

quest_flags.<STRING: short_quest_id>: <STRING: Current tracking phase, strictly restricted to 'inactive' | 'active' | 'completed' | 'failed'>

dm_notes: <STRING: High-density narrative logic, immediate environment notes, hidden enemy traps, or behavioral conditions for current state processing. Keep brief.>
